title: Backend: bd CLI wrapper service
description: Create a Node.js service that spawns bd CLI commands via child_process and returns structured JSON responses. Handle working directory, env vars (BEADS_WORKSPACE), error parsing, and timeout. This is the core adapter between the API and beads.

title: Scaffold monorepo: frontend + backend packages
description: Set up pnpm workspace monorepo with packages/web (Vite+React+TS) and packages/api (Node+Hono+TS). Configure shared tsconfig, eslint, prettier. Add root package.json scripts: dev, build, lint, typecheck.

title: ADR: Tech stack decision for BeadsUI
description: Record the architectural decision for the BeadsUI stack. Frontend: React + TypeScript + Vite. Styling: Tailwind CSS. State/data: TanStack Query. Backend: Node.js + Hono (lightweight API server). API approach: spawn bd CLI commands via child_process, stream output via SSE. Graph viz: React Flow. Package manager: pnpm.
design:
**Decision:** React 18 + TypeScript + Vite (frontend), Node.js + Hono (backend API), pnpm workspaces (monorepo), Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui (styling), TanStack Query v5 (server state), React Router v6 (routing), React Flow (dependency graph), cmdk (command palette), react-markdown (markdown rendering).

**API approach:** Backend spawns bd CLI via child_process with --json flag. No direct DB access — all reads/writes go through bd commands. This keeps compatibility with any beads version and avoids CGO/embedded-dolt issues on Windows.

**Why Hono:** Lightweight, TypeScript-first, runs on Node/Bun/Deno, excellent middleware support, tiny bundle.

**Why pnpm workspaces:** Efficient deduplication, strict linking, fast installs. Two packages: packages/web, packages/api.

**Rejected alternatives:** Next.js (overkill for local tool), tRPC (adds complexity without benefit for this use case), Electron (heavier than needed — browser tab is fine).

title: Frontend: dashboard / home view
description: Build / dashboard: stats cards (open/closed/blocked/in-progress counts), ready-to-work queue (top 5 unblocked issues), recent activity feed, stale issues warning, health indicators from bd doctor. Quick-create button. Refresh via SSE events.

title: Frontend: create issue modal/form
description: Build create issue modal with fields: title (required), type (select), priority (select 0-4), description (textarea), labels (multi-select), assignee, acceptance criteria, design notes. Submit calls POST /issues. Show created issue ID in toast, optionally navigate to detail.

title: Frontend: issue detail view
description: Build /issues/:id page showing all issue fields: title, description, status, type, priority, assignee, labels, design, acceptance criteria, notes, dependencies (blocks/blocked-by), comments, history. Inline edit for title/description. Action buttons: close, reopen, claim, add dep, add comment.

title: Frontend: issue list view with filters & sorting
description: Build /issues page: table/card view of issues with columns (ID, title, status, type, priority, assignee, updated). Filter bar: status, type, priority, label, assignee. Sort by priority/updated/created. Pagination or infinite scroll. Click row → /issues/:id.

title: Frontend: TanStack Query API client hooks
description: Create typed API client using fetch + TanStack Query. Hooks: useIssues(filters), useIssue(id), useCreateIssue, useUpdateIssue, useCloseIssue, useGraph, useReady, useStats, useSearch(q), useMemories. Configure query invalidation on mutations.

title: Frontend: shared UI component library
description: Build reusable components: Badge (status/priority/type colors), Button, Input, Select, Modal, Tooltip, Spinner, EmptyState, ErrorBoundary, Toast notifications. Use shadcn/ui or build from scratch with Tailwind. Export from packages/web/src/components/ui/.

title: Frontend: app shell, routing, layout
description: Set up React Router with routes: / (dashboard), /issues (list), /issues/:id (detail), /graph (dependency graph), /memories, /settings. Create persistent sidebar nav with icons, top bar with search, and main content area. Dark/light theme toggle (Tailwind dark mode).

title: Backend: REST API routes for dependencies, graph, ready
description: Implement routes: GET /issues/:id/deps, POST /issues/:id/deps (add dep), DELETE /issues/:id/deps/:depId, GET /graph (full dep graph as nodes+edges JSON), GET /ready (unblocked issues), GET /blocked.

title: Backend: REST API routes for issues (CRUD)
description: Implement Hono routes: GET /issues (list with filters), GET /issues/:id (show), POST /issues (create), PATCH /issues/:id (update), POST /issues/:id/close, POST /issues/:id/reopen, DELETE /issues/:id. All routes delegate to bd CLI wrapper.

title: BeadsUI - Feature rich WebUI for Beads
description: Gather information about beads and everything needed. Then set up all issues required to develop a WebUI to manage and use beads, so each issue can be worked on autonomously until the project is finished and ready to use.

title: Frontend: error handling, loading states, empty states
description: Add consistent UX for: API errors (toast + retry button), loading skeletons for list/detail views, empty states with helpful CTAs (e.g. 'No issues yet — create one'), offline detection banner. Use React Error Boundary for unexpected crashes.

title: Backend: REST API routes for config, epics, history
description: Implement routes: GET /config (bd config list), GET /epics (bd epic list), GET /issues/:id/history (bd history), GET /issues/:id/children (bd children), GET /doctor (bd doctor output). These support the settings and epic views.

title: Frontend: search view with instant results
description: Build global search: command palette (Cmd+K) + /search page. Instant search via GET /search?q= with debounce. Show results grouped by type (open/closed). Highlight matching text. Keyboard navigation (arrow keys + enter). Recent searches stored in localStorage.

title: Frontend: comments and notes panel
description: Build collapsible comments/notes section on the issue detail view. Display comments with author, timestamp, body (markdown rendered). Add comment form at bottom. Support bd note (append-only) vs bd comment (threaded). Render markdown with react-markdown.

title: Frontend: epic management view
description: Build epic view showing all epics with progress bars (closed/total children), expand to show child issues inline, drill-down to epic detail. Support creating issues directly under an epic. Show blocked count per epic.

title: Frontend: dependency graph visualization
description: Build /graph page using React Flow. Fetch GET /graph (nodes+edges). Node colors by status (open=blue, in_progress=yellow, closed=green, blocked=red). Click node → issue detail panel. Minimap, zoom/pan controls. Highlight critical path. Filter by epic/label.

title: Backend: SSE endpoint for real-time issue updates
description: Implement GET /events as a Server-Sent Events stream. Poll the beads db (or watch git hooks) for changes and push events to connected clients. Events: issue_created, issue_updated, issue_closed. Frontend uses EventSource to subscribe.

title: Backend: REST API routes for memories, stats, search
description: Implement routes: GET /memories, POST /memories, DELETE /memories/:id, GET /stats, GET /search?q=, GET /stale, GET /lint. These power the dashboard and search UI.

title: Backend: REST API routes for comments, notes, labels
description: Implement routes: GET /issues/:id/comments, POST /issues/:id/comments, POST /issues/:id/notes, GET /labels, POST /issues/:id/labels, DELETE /issues/:id/labels/:label. Delegate to bd CLI.

title: Docker: containerize API + frontend for production
description: Write Dockerfile (multi-stage: build frontend → serve via API static handler) and docker-compose.yml. Mount beads workspace via volume. Expose port 3000. Add .dockerignore. Document: docker run -v /path/to/project:/workspace beadsui. Target: single-container deployment.

title: Frontend: keyboard shortcuts & command palette
description: Implement global keyboard shortcuts: Cmd+K (search/command palette), C (create issue), G I (go to issues), G D (go to dashboard), G G (go to graph). Command palette supports fuzzy search over issues and navigation commands. Use cmdk library.

title: Frontend: settings page (workspace config)
description: Build /settings page: display current bd config (GET /config), allow editing key settings (actor, validation, backup). Show workspace info (prefix, database path, version). Link to bd doctor output. Read-only display of integration configs (GitHub/Jira/Linear).

title: Frontend: memories view
description: Build /memories page listing all bd memories with search/filter. Each memory shows: content, created date. Actions: delete (bd forget). Add memory form at top. Useful for reviewing persistent agent knowledge.

title: Frontend: mobile responsive layout
description: Ensure all views work on mobile (< 768px): sidebar collapses to bottom nav or hamburger menu, issue list becomes card stack, graph view has pinch-to-zoom, modals go full-screen. Test with Chrome DevTools mobile emulation.
